---
image: Headshot.jpg
about:
  template: trestles
  links:
    - text: LinkedIn
      url: "https://www.linkedin.com/in/ludovica-ciasullo-034960131/"
    - text: Email
      url: "mailto:ludovica.ciasullo@gmail.com"
---

### **Welcome!**

I am an [Associate](https://www.cornerstone.com/professionals/ludovica-ciasullo/) at Cornerstone Research, New York. I received my Ph.D. in Economics from New York University.

You can find my research [here](papers.html), and [here](https://ludovica-ciasullo.github.io/CV.pdf) is my CV. contact me at ludovica.ciasullo@gmail.com
